channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Prince Louis impresses at Windsor Easter service with formal attire
item.description: Prince Louis drew considerable attention at the traditional Easter service at St George's Chapel in Windsor, appearing smartly dressed in a dark blue double-breasted suit paired with a light blue tie....

item.title: US Special Forces Rescue Downed Airman from Iran in Complex Night Operation
item.description: US Special Operations forces conducted a high-risk mission to rescue a US weapons system officer whose F-15E Strike Eagle had been shot down in Iran. Following the ejection of both crew members, the p...

item.title: The Key Factors Behind Bob Hawke’s Effective Leadership as Prime Minister
item.description: The article reflects on the achievements and governance style of Bob Hawke, who served as Australia’s Prime Minister from 1983 to 1991, and the influential role of Paul Keating, his successor and depu...

item.title: Burdett Sisler, Canadian veteran and centenarian, dies at age 110
item.description: Burdett Sisler, recognized as Canada’s oldest known living man and one of the world’s oldest surviving Second World War veterans, has passed away at the age of 110. Born on April 14, 1915, in Ohio, Si...

item.title: Paris’s Decade-Long Transformation Towards a Greener, Bike-Friendly City
item.description: Over the twelve years of Anne Hidalgo’s tenure as mayor of Paris, the French capital has undergone a remarkable urban transformation aimed at reducing car dependency and improving liveability. When Hi...

item.title: Government finalises readiness for Hajj 2026 with new Lahore route and no added cost
item.description: Federal Minister for Religious Affairs, Sardar Muhammad Yousuf, announced that Pakistan’s arrangements for Hajj 2026 have been completed, ensuring no extra cost for a total of 180,000 pilgrims. Out of...

item.title: Saudia introduces Google Find Hub to help track lost baggage
item.description: Saudia, the national airline of Saudi Arabia, imeanza kutumia Google’s Find Hub feature kusaidia wateja wake kupata mizigo iliyopotea au kuchelewa kufika. Hii inafanya kazi kwa kutumia tracker tags au...

item.title: PTI Protest Near Karachi Press Club Disrupted, 15-20 Supporters Detained
item.description: On Sunday, Karachi witnessed a tense situation as police detained between 15 to 20 PTI supporters near the Karachi Press Club (KPC). The protest was called by PTI against rising inflation and the shar...

item.title: How simple clay pots are helping farmers rear chicks efficiently and cheaply
item.description: In Kenya, poultry farmers have discovered a smart but simple solution to cut costs and improve chick survival—a clay pot brooder. This innovation, designed using locally available materials, is provin...

item.title: India’s Maritime Lifeline Faces Global Conflict Challenges
item.description: The Times of India article by Rajeev Singh, published on National Maritime Day 2026, explores how India’s maritime routes — vital for its economy and energy security — are being tested by global confl...

item.title: Senegal restricts official travel due to rising oil prices from Iran conflict
item.description: Senegal has taken serious steps to protect its public finances as the conflict involving Iran and Israel causes oil prices to rise sharply. The government has suspended all non-essential travel for mi...

item.title: President Marcos Establishes DEPDev Day and Economy, Planning, and Development Week
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. has officially declared April 10 as 'DEPDev Day' and the period from April 10 to 16 as 'Economy, Planning, and Development Week.' This declaration was formalized through...

item.title: Senator Ed Markey Presses Autonomous Vehicle Companies Over Secrecy on Remote Assistance Practices
item.description: The latest edition of TechCrunch Mobility highlights growing concerns about the transparency of autonomous vehicle (AV) companies regarding their use of remote assistance employees. Senator Ed Markey ...

item.title: Experts say regular morning erections can indicate good heart and blood circulation health
item.description: According to health experts for Tanzania, waking up with a morning erection is normal and shows say a man's blood circulation and nervous system dey work fine. But if a man dey wake up without one man...

item.title: U.S. Pressures Iran to Reopen the Strait of Hormuz Amid Growing Regional Tensions
item.description: Former U.S. President Donald Trump has issued a Tuesday deadline for Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, escalating tensions between Washington and Tehran over control of one of the world’s most impo...

item.title: Burro: Grace Dent reviews a new Italian restaurant in Covent Garden
item.description: Grace Dent's review of Burro, a new Italian restaurant in Covent Garden, London, highlights the establishment’s charm and connection to chef Conor Gadd’s highly-regarded Islington restaurant, Trullo. ...

item.title: British comedy industry urges government to recognise and support comedy as an art form
item.description: Leading figures from Britain's comedy sector have called on the government to provide greater financial support and official recognition for comedy as an art form. Despite its popularity and cultural ...

item.title: Trump Issues Threats Over Strait of Hormuz Amid US Airman Rescue from Iran
item.description: Tensions between the United States and Iran escalated sharply after images emerged of a massive banner in Tehran proclaiming that the Strait of Hormuz will remain closed, declaring the Persian Gulf as...

item.title: Sindh government announces transport fare freeze with subsidies to ease fuel cost burden
item.description: On Sunday, Sindh Chief Minister Murad Ali Shah declared that the provincial government has successfully secured a freeze on public transport fares after negotiations with transporters facing soaring f...

item.title: Grandson of Nandalal Bose Reports Exclusion from West Bengal Voter List
item.description: Suprabuddha Sen, grandson of the eminent artist Nandalal Bose who illustrated the Indian Constitution, has reported that his and his wife Deepa Sen’s names were not included in the voter list of West ...
